name: Grand Theft Auto VI
summary: The single most anticipated release of the year, taking players back to a massive, modern reimagining of Vice City and the state of Leonida.

name: Resident Evil Requiem
summary: A terrifying return to Raccoon City starring veteran Leon S. Kennedy and newcomer Grace Ashcroft, set 30 years after the biological disaster.

name: 007 First Light
summary: Developed by the creators of Hitman, this espionage thriller serves as an origin story detailing how a young James Bond earned his 00 status.

name: Marvel's Wolverine
summary: A brutal, standalone superhero adventure developed by Insomniac Games focusing on the iconic mutant's globe-spanning search for answers.

name: Pragmata
summary: Capcom's mysterious new IP following a spacefarer named Hugh and his android companion Diana as they explore a lunar research station.

name: Fable
summary: The long-awaited reboot of the classic fantasy franchise, bringing players back to Albion with its signature blend of heroic action and British humor.

name: Reanimal
summary: A creepy, atmospheric adventure from the creators of Little Nightmares where a brother and sister must survive horrific, twisted creatures.

name: Subnautica 2
summary: The highly anticipated sequel to the underwater survival hit, expanding the formula with an overhauled building system and up-to-four-player co-op.

name: Forza Horizon 6
summary: The next major installment of the premier open-world racing franchise, bringing its massive car roster and festival vibes to an exciting new location.

name: Code Vein II
summary: A sequel to the vampire-themed Soulslike that delivers more methodical combat, new weapons, and an expansive character creator.

name: Control Resonant
summary: The supernatural sequel to Control, this time following Jesse's brother Dylan as he wields psychic powers to fight cosmic threats in Manhattan.

name: Mario Tennis Fever
summary: A competitive new Mario sports title launching on the Switch 2, featuring fighting-game-like mechanics and customizable Fever Rackets.

name: Pokémon Pokopia
summary: A cozy, Animal Crossing-style spin-off where you play as a shape-shifting Ditto tasked with building and tending to a vibrant town for Pokémon.

name: Invincible VS
summary: A brutal, fast-paced 3v3 tag-team fighting game featuring characters from the hit Amazon Prime animated series.
